title: chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. undulatum
intro: Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. undulatum, commonly known as the coast daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Chrysocephalum apiculatum subsp. undulatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity against various pathogens. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
